vocab_items.explanation: A game played by two teams who try to throw a ball through a hoop.
A person who is on the same team as you.

vocab_items.sentence: Sally runs to her team's side of the basketball court.
vocab_items.explanation: The rectangular area where basketball is played.

vocab_items.sentence: She shoots the ball into the basket.
vocab_items.explanation: To throw the ball toward the hoop to score a point.
A word people shout to show they are very happy or excited.

vocab_items.sentence: Her teammate passes the ball to her.
vocab_items.explanation: To throw or kick the ball to another player on your team.

vocab_items.sentence: She shoots the ball into the basket.
vocab_items.explanation: To throw the ball toward the goal.

vocab_items.sentence: Suddenly, a dog runs onto the court!
vocab_items.explanation: To enter a field or court by running.
